tool_args.label: MTA EEO Complaints Decreased 2020 to 2021
tool_args.raw_text: During 2021, MTA Agencies handled a total of 141 EEO complaints; of which 91 were internal and 50 were external. During 2020, MTA Agencies handled a total of 196 EEO complaints; of which 144 were internal and 52 were external complaints.

payload.claim_text: EEO complaints decreased from 196 in 2020 to 141 in 2021
payload.description: MTA experienced a decrease in EEO complaints from 196 in 2020 to 141 in 2021

evidence_refs.source_quote: During 2021, MTA Agencies handled a total of 141 EEO complaints

tool_args.label: SBDP Small Business Mentoring Program Success
tool_args.raw_text: The Small Business Mentoring Program has been very successful. It was reauthorized by the former New York governor for another 10 years and the city of New York has mimicked this program for the New York City Department of Design and Construction.

payload.claim_text: The Small Business Mentoring Program has been very successful
payload.description: SBDP Small Business Mentoring Program was reauthorized for 10 years and replicated by NYC

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Small Business Mentoring Program has been very successful. It was reauthorized by the former New York governor for another 10 years
